sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63680" key="lixnofila/rguros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λιχνο-φῐλάργῠρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63680.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">both epicure and miser</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0494.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philyll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope> </bibl>(s. v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
